tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Creates a brand-new note. Only call this when no suitable note already exists. If a note with a similar title already exists, use update_note or append_to_note instead.

content.description: Optional body text or markdown for the note

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: Lists notes (newest first). Optionally filter by a search string that matches title or body.

search.description: Optional text to match title or body (case-insensitive). Uses the full phrase first; for multi-word queries, notes matching any significant word are included if no exact phrase match (e.g. "spanish note" can match title "Spanish 101").

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to return (default 30, max 100)

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Reads the full title and body of one note by its stable id. Use list_notes to discover ids.

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Replaces the body of an existing note (optionally renames it too). Use this to write content into a note that exists but has an empty body, or to fully replace the body. Omit a field to leave it unchanged.

content.description: New body text replacing the whole note (optional). Empty string clears the body.

tools.name: append_to_note
tools.description: Appends text to the end of an existing note's body, preserving existing content. Use this to add to a note that already has content.

tools.name: open_note
tools.description: Switches to the Notes module and opens the note in the editor so the user can see and edit it.
